---
output: github_document
---

<!-- Inspired by https://github.com/EmilHvitfeldt/EmilHvitfeldt -->

<pre>

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(htmltools)
library(emoji)

leaf <- function(name, link, desc, space) {
  paste0(
    " ",
    as.character(a(name, href = link)),
    strrep(" ", space),
    "- ",
    desc
  )
}

# R package ------------------------------------------------------------------

mor <- leaf(
  "MOR", 
  "https://shafayetshafee.github.io/MOR/", 
  "Calculate Median Odds Ratio From a Fitted Multilevel Binary Logistic Model", 
  22 - nchar("mor")
)

skmisc <- leaf(
  "skmisc", 
  "https://shafayetshafee.github.io/skmisc/", 
  "package with some useful functions to make life easier", 
  22 - nchar("skmisc")
)

chunkthis <- leaf(
  "chunkthis",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/chunkthis",
  "Rstudio Addin to create code chunks with copied R code",
  22 - nchar("chunkthis")
)

hugodownplus <- leaf(
  "hugodownplus",
  "https://timteafan.github.io/hugodownplus/",
  "Extend 'hugodown's markdown document with toc and html boxes",
  22 - nchar("hugodownplus")
)

# python package -------------------------------------------------------------

skmiscpy <- leaf(
  "skmiscpy",
  "https://skmiscpy.readthedocs.io/en/latest/",
  "A python package providing Contains a few functions useful for data-analysis, causal inference etc.",
  22 - nchar("skmiscpy")
)

kedrogen <- leaf(
  "kedrogen",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/kedrogen",
  "A simple CLI command that generate a Kedro project from a cookiecutter template in the current directory.",
  22 - nchar("kedrogen")
)

# Bash Script ----------------------------------------------------------------   

uvshot <- leaf(
  "uvshot",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/uvshot",
  "Python setup scripts using uv",
  22 - nchar("uvshot")
)

# Reproducible analysis ------------------------------------------------------

mad_coc_ipw <- leaf(
  "mad-coc-IPW",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/mad-coc-IPW",
  "Contains docker image to reproduce of an analysis results",
  22 - nchar("mad-coc-IPW")
)

contained_thesis <- leaf(
  "contained-thesis",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/contained-thesis",
  "Contains docker image to reproduce of a simulation results",
  22 - nchar("contained-thesis")
)


# Dataviz projects  ----------------------------------------------------------

wildlife_plane_damage <- leaf(
  "WlidLife Strike",
  "https://shafayetshafee.github.io/wildlife_plane_damage/",
  "A dashboard showing plane damage by wildlife strike",
  22 - nchar("wildlife strike")
)

tidytuesday <- leaf(
  "TidyTuesday",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/TidyTuesday",
  "My contributions to the #TidyTuesday weekly data project",
  22 - nchar("tidytuesday")
)

# Quarto Ext -----------------------------------------------------------------  

reveal_header <- leaf(
  "reveal-header",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header",
  "Add header text and header logo in all pages of RevealJs slide",
  22 - nchar("reveal-header")
)

line_highlight <- leaf(
  "line-highlight",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/line-highlight",
  "Implement code line highlighting for HTML docs",
  22 - nchar("line_highlight")
)

downloadthis <- leaf(
  "downloadthis",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/downloadthis",
  "Embed download buttons in HTML docs",
  22 - nchar("downloadthis")
)

interactive_sql <- leaf(
  "interactive-sql",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/interactive-sql",
  "Run sql examples interactively in RevealJs slide or HTML files",
  22 - nchar("interactive-sql")
)

collapse_callout <- leaf(
  "collapse-callout",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/collapse-callout",
  "Make the Callouts collapsible globally in HTML docs",
  22 - nchar("collapse-callout")
)

metropolis_beamer <- leaf(
  "metropolis-beamer",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/metropolis-beamer",
  "Another Quarto reveal.js template extension inspired by Beamer Metropolis theme",
  22 - nchar("metropolis-beamer")
)

metropolis <- leaf(
  "metropolis",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/metropolis",
  "Quarto reveal.js template extension inspired by Metropolis theme",
  22 - nchar("metropolis")
)

bsicons <- leaf(
  "bsicons",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/bsicons",
  "use Bootstrap Icons in HTML docs and RevealJs presentations",
  22 - nchar("bsicons")
)

nameref <- leaf(
  "nameref",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/nameref",
  "Use named reference in Quarto Docs",
  22 - nchar("nameref")
)

add_code_files <- leaf(
  "add-code-files",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/add-code-files",
  "Add contents from external source or code files",
  22 - nchar("add-code-files")
)

code_fullscreen <- leaf(
  "code-fullscreen",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/code-fullscreen",
  "Adds a full screen button in the code blocks in Quarto docs.",
  22 - nchar("code-fullscreen")
)

collapse_social_embeds <- leaf(
  "collapse-social-embeds",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/collapse-social-embeds",
  "Make collapsible callouts with Github gist, tweets, youtube vids etc",
  22 - 22
)

black_formatter <- leaf(
  "black-formatter",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/black-formatter",
  "Format the codes in python code chunk using black",
  22 - nchar("black-formatter")
)

material_icons <- leaf(
  "material-icons",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/material-icons",
  "Use Google Material Design Icons in Quarto docs",
  22 - nchar("material-icons")
)

hide_comment <- leaf(
  "hide-comment",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/hide-comment",
  "Add comments in code chunk, hidden in rendered output",
  22 - nchar("hide-comment")
)

style_speaker_note <- leaf(
  "style-speaker-note",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/style-speaker-note",
  "Style speaker notes of the RevealJs slides from a css file",
  22 - nchar("style-speaker-note")
)


# Other ----------------------------------------------------------------------

beamer <- leaf(
  "Beamer Templates",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/beamer-template",
  "My collection of beamer templates",
  22 - nchar("Beamer Templates")
)

dbt_demo <- leaf(
  "DBT Demo Project",
  "https://github.com/shafayetShafee/dbt-demo-project",
  "A Demo DBT Project",
  22 - nchar("Beamer Templates")
)

header <- function(emoji, text) {
  res <- glue::glue(":{emoji}: <b>{text}</b>")
  emoji_glue(res)
}

data <- tibble::tribble(
  ~id, ~child, ~text,
  "kshafayet", 
  c("r-packages", "py-packages", "bash", "docker-img", "dataviz", "quarto", "other"), 
  header("puzzle", "Shafayet Khan Shafee"),
  
  "r-packages", 
  c("mor", "skmisc", "chunkthis", "hugodownplus"), 
  header("package", "R Packages"),
  
  "mor", c(), mor,
  "skmisc", c(), skmisc,
  "chunkthis", c(), chunkthis,
  "hugodownplus", c(), hugodownplus,
  
  "py-packages", c("skmiscpy", "kedrogen"), header("snake", "Python Packages"),
  "skmiscpy", c(), skmiscpy,
  "kedrogen", c(), kedrogen,
  
  "bash", c("uvshot"), header("scroll", "Bash Scripts"),
  "uvshot", c(), uvshot,
  
  "docker-img", c("mad-coc-IPW", "contained-thesis"), header("whale", "Docker Images"),
  "mad-coc-IPW", c(), mad_coc_ipw,
  "contained-thesis", c(), contained_thesis,
  
  "dataviz", c("Wildlife Strikes", "Tidytuesday"), header("bar_chart", "DataViz"),
  "Wildlife Strikes", c(), wildlife_plane_damage,
  "Tidytuesday", c(), tidytuesday,
    
  "quarto", 
  c("reveal-header", "line-highlight", "downloadthis", "interactive-sql",
  "collapse-callout", "metropolis-beamer", "metropolis", "bsicons",
  "nameref", "add-code-files", "code-fullscreen", "collapse-social-embeds",
  "black-formatter", "material-icons", "hide-comment", "style-speaker-note"), 
  header("blue_circle", "Quarto Extensions"),
    
  "reveal-header", c(), reveal_header,
  "line-highlight", c(), line_highlight,
  "downloadthis", c(), downloadthis,
  "interactive-sql", c(), interactive_sql,
  "collapse-callout", c(), collapse_callout,
  "metropolis-beamer", c(), metropolis_beamer,
  "metropolis", c(), metropolis,
  "bsicons", c(), bsicons,
  "nameref", c(), nameref,
  "add-code-files", c(), add_code_files,
  "code-fullscreen", c(), code_fullscreen,
  "collapse-social-embeds", c(), collapse_social_embeds,
  "black-formatter", c(), black_formatter,
  "material-icons", c(), material_icons,
  "hide-comment", c(), hide_comment,
  "style-speaker-note", c(), style_speaker_note,

  
  "other", c("DBT Demo Project", "beamer-template"), header("light_bulb", "Other"),
  "DBT Demo Project", c(), dbt_demo,  
  "beamer-template", c(), beamer
)

cat(paste0(cli::tree(data, width = 10000), collapse = "  \n"))
```

</pre>
